violations.description: INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): Flystrips with dead flies attached located above food prep areas and above clean dishes in the kitchen. Flysrips removed upon request.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical spray bottles noted not labeled in food prep area.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep areas.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Ice machine interior not properly maintained.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Cardboard being used as a shelf liner noted not properly designed. | NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers and walkin cooler door noted not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors walls and ceiling in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use food containers noted being stored on the floor.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils noted being stored with the handles laying in the sugar and salt

FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Time rather than temperature was being used but in an inproper manner as a control for public health protection. Time and labelling documentation not being used for sushi rice Educated staff on proper techniques for using time as a control measure.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical spray bottles noted not labeled in food prep area.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Microwave interior noted not in good repair
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling and ceiling vents in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gaskets on reachin coolers and walkin cooler door noted not in good repair. | NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Cardboard being used as a shelf liner noted not properly designed.
